title: The FE Grid
description: A simple Minecraft mod for generating, transporting, and storing FE, with overcomplicated crafting recipes.
body: # The FE Grid ## This mod adds some blocks for generating, transporting, and storing FE. One block this mod adds is the [Energy block](https://github.com/calebdagr8est/The-FE-Grid/wiki/The-Energy-Block). It is a block of infinite energy and can only be obtained in creative. Another block added is the [solar panel](https://github.com/calebdagr8est/The-FE-Grid/wiki/Solar-Panels). It can be used to generate FE if exposed to the sky. Normally you wouldn't see solar panels just laying on the ground so the solar panels can be placed on frames to make things look more realistic. [Cables](https://github.com/calebdagr8est/The-FE-Grid/wiki/Cables) can be used to transport FE around your world. The FE storage blocks store FE. So far there is 250kFE, 500kFE, 1mFE and 2mFE storage units. --- Website: https://fatalmistake02.notion.site/The-FE-Grid-1ecf9c81abac80cf8344ca709ab9b84e --- ### I will continue (for as long as i can) to add more features and blocks. --- If you would like to help with the mod, or need help, join the discord server: https://discord.gg/pmsRstnNzn --- FE Grid logo text by Font Generator ---
